note: Phase 0 reconciliation: resolves the apparent AssetRegistry hash discrepancy found during the pre-implementation audit.
finding: Not a conflict. hash-941e7b72522da013fb6d0b173a87b258376b98bd0bc5217c3e1350573f90c138 is the Odra ContractPackage hash (written to the deployer account's named_keys as 'assetregistry' for upgradability). hash-1120c2a6308ee3e60bcbc17771ec018f5ef9ba7d0322c55747d341ad752d50ec is the concrete Contract entity hash — the one deploy-v2-testnet.js's extractContractHash() already extracts, and the one already consistently stored in agents/.env, backend/.env, and scripts/deployment-results.json.
action_taken: None required — existing .env files already reference the correct (concrete Contract) hash. RentalEscrow (Phase 2) will be initialized against this same canonical hash.
